overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban plaza and boardwalk under an elevated highway during golden hour. The scene transitions from a tree-lined stone plaza to a crowded wooden boardwalk with graffiti-covered walls, then to a darker, trash-strewn section deeper under the overpass.

events.description: slight left turn toward the boardwalk entrance
ground surface changes from cobblestone plaza to wooden boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the wooden boardwalk section under the highway

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure casting shadows over the plaza
tall trees with green foliage lining the plaza background
low metal fence separating the plaza from the planted area
tall cylindrical light posts with white illumination
textured stone pavement covering the plaza ground

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an open urban plaza with scattered pedestrians and tall trees. The ground is paved with cobblestones, and massive concrete highway pillars loom overhead. Around 10 seconds, the surface transitions to wooden planks as the player approaches the boardwalk entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded pedestrian boardwalk under elevated highway

events.description: entering the covered wooden boardwalk area with graffiti-covered walls
crowd density increases significantly with many pedestrians walking in opposing direction

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense crowds on the wooden boardwalk under the highway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red cap and dark jacket walking directly toward camera
pedestrian in black dress walking past the camera

entered.detail: wooden plank walkway extending under the overpass
tall concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti and street art
blue industrial trash containers along the left railing
staircase leading up to the highway level on the right side

segments.scene_description: The player moves onto a wooden boardwalk under the elevated highway, where crowd density increases significantly. The right wall features extensive graffiti art, and warm sunlight casts long shadows across the path. Many pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, creating a bustling urban atmosphere.

events.description: crowd density decreases and trash becomes more visible along the left railing
entering deeper shade under the overpass with reduced direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along the boardwalk as crowds thin and urban debris accumulates

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench along the left railing

entered.detail: concrete benches along the railing where people are sitting
litter and debris accumulating along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: As the player progresses, the crowd thins out and the boardwalk shows more signs of urban decay with scattered trash and people resting on benches. The lighting becomes more diffused as the path goes deeper under the overpass, while distant neon signs remain visible through the palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded underpass with heavy trash accumulation

events.description: entering deep shadow under the overpass with significantly reduced visibility
large piles of trash bags and debris visible along the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the darker, less populated section with accumulated trash and debris

entered.detail: large accumulated piles of garbage bags and scattered debris
metal safety railing along the left edge of the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The final section is noticeably darker and more enclosed under the highway overpass. Large piles of trash and debris accumulate along the left railing, and few pedestrians remain. The wooden boardwalk continues into the shadowy underpass with graffiti-covered walls still visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open urban plaza into the shadowed, decaying depths of a highway underpass. It begins on a cobblestone plaza among scattered pedestrians and tall trees, moving beneath massive concrete pillars before the ground transitions into wooden planks. As the camera enters a bustling boardwalk, the atmosphere becomes more crowded and vibrant, with warm golden sunlight casting long shadows against walls covered in extensive graffiti. The scene then shifts toward a sense of urban decay as the crowd thins and the lighting becomes more diffused, revealing scattered trash and people resting on benches beneath palm trees. Finally, the path leads deeper into a dark, enclosed section of the overpass where debris accumulates along the railings and the environment fades into a shadowy, graffiti-lined corridor.
